name: BIMobject AB
summary: BIMobject AB operates a cloud based content platform for the construction industry worldwide. It offers BIMobject Cloud, an Internet based central database that holds various BIM objects information and BIM files; BIMobject Apps; BIManalytics Core, a pre-sales, business, and marketing analytics tool; BIMobject Product Site, a microsite for building and interior product manufacturers to create and maintain their digital product catalogue on their Website; BIMobject Hercules, a cloud solution for large companies to develop, organize, structure, standardize, manage, publish, and syndicate their BIM objects; BIMobject Properties that allows the manufacturer to add properties, such as classification systems; and BIMobject Mosquito to create BIM objects in the BIMobject Cloud. The company also provides BIMscript, a solution to streamline and accelerate the process of BIM content creation; BIMobject Marketing Campaign for marketers working at a building product manufacturing company to engage and communicate with the target audience; and BIMsupply, a cloud-based solution that allows BIM users to create bill of materials, tenders, bids, and direct orders, as well as object creation and process solutions. In addition, it offers services, such as 3D modelling, programming, scripting, conversion of CAD, and other data to build a BIM objects. BIMobject AB has a strategic cooperation agreement with Solar A/S for the digital construction business. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
